scripts.package: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'release' | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem 'release' -Filter 'youtube-mix-blocker-*.zip' | Remove-Item -Force; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist/*' -DestinationPath 'release/youtube-mix-blocker-chrome-1.5.3.zip'"
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run verify:locales && npm run verify:manifest && npm run qa:store-screenshot-copy && npm run verify:store-media && npm run verify:release && node --check scripts/build-content.mjs && node --check scripts/chrome-locales.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-store-screenshot-copy.mjs && node --check scripts/render-store-screenshots.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-chrome-locales.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-store-screenshot-globals.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-locales.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-store-media.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release.mjs && node --check dist/content.js && node --check dist/background.js && node --check dist/popup/popup.js
